guest: Ariana Simpson, Early-stage crypto investor and former Facebook employee

business_ideas.idea: Bitcoin and non-state currencies for financial freedom and sovereignty
Crypto venture fund to invest in early-stage projects

predictions.text: Bitcoin will compete with state-run currencies and achieve massive market penetration globally
Large financial institutions like Goldman Sachs will increasingly build crypto products

dynamics: Ariana drives the narrative with deep crypto expertise from early 2013. She grounds skepticism-laden listeners with first-principles thinking about money and currencies. High engagement as Ariana pivots between technical depth and accessible analogies.
frameworks: Non-sovereign currency thesis (10-word explanation: money not issued by governments enables freedom from centralized control)
learnings: Early adopters of emerging technology face social friction and skepticism, but those with conviction can succeed
Being vastly outnumbered in a field (female in Bitcoin meetups) is an advantage if you persist
Community support can emerge unexpectedly when you contribute genuine value

banger_quotes.quote: It either goes fucking huge or it dies
I'm just going to keep showing up and onwards

numbers_dropped: Bitcoin at $100-$413 when Ariana first got involved
Ariana invested 50% of net worth into Bitcoin early on
notable: Ariana explains Bitcoin's whitepaper and early-stage community dynamics from authentic perspective as one of few women in 2013 crypto meetups.
